description: Poster combining a photo with assembled news headlines. The top is a dark-vignetted color photograph of Donald Trump in a dark navy suit, white shirt and purple tie, wearing a red 'MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN' cap, giving a salute while looking upward. Across the middle in large white type (italic 'Hire' and bold caps) is the text 'Hire AMERICAN!'. Below are three torn-paper-style clipped headlines from outlets: TIME ('Trump Administration launches H-1B Visa Probe Project Firewall'); The Washington Post ('Trump administration to get tough on companies that misuse the H-1B visa'); and a blue Bloomberg Law banner ('Labor Department Threatens H-1B Ban for Rule-Breaking Businesses').
notable_text: Hire AMERICAN! / Trump Administration launches H-1B Visa Probe 'Project Firewall' / Trump administration to get tough on companies that misuse the H-1B visa / Labor Department Threatens H-1B Ban for Rule-Breaking Businesses
